sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27826" key="dogmatopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δογμᾰτο-ποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n27826.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maintenance of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δόγματα,</foreign> Aristob. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:13:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
